blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
